parameters.query: SELECT d.agent_id, d.strategy, COUNT(*) AS total_decisions, SUM(CASE WHEN d.outcome = 'profit' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, SUM(CASE WHEN d.outcome = 'loss' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.outcome = 'profit' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS win_rate, ROUND(SUM(d.pnl_usd)::numeric, 2) AS total_pnl, ROUND(AVG(d.pnl_usd)::numeric, 4) AS avg_pnl, ROUND(MAX(d.pnl_usd)::numeric, 2) AS best_trade, ROUND(MIN(d.pnl_usd)::numeric, 2) AS worst_trade, ROUND(STDDEV(d.pnl_usd)::numeric, 4) AS pnl_stddev FROM agent_decisions d WHERE d.decided_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND d.outcome IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.agent_id, d.strategy ORDER BY total_pnl DESC;
